name: Auditing Retrieval-Augmented LLM Hypotheses for Longitudinal Cell Painting Morphology

description: arXiv:2607.19415v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: High-content morphological profiling (Cell Painting) yields sensitive, high-dimensional signatures of cellular state, but translating longitudinal morphology trajectories into interpretable biology remains difficult, especially for weak, chronic perturbations such as low-dose-rate ionizing radiation.
